title: VmAudioStatusOutputV1
description:
Output for `d2b audio status --json` (version 1).

Per-VM entries are sorted by VM name. Per-VM errors are emitted separately so a single misconfigured provider does not suppress all other entries.

entries.description: Per-VM state for targets that resolved successfully.

errors.description: Per-VM errors for targets that could not be resolved.

AudioEnforcementPosture.description:
How audio enforcement is applied for a target VM (ADR 0041).

This enum describes only *successful* enforcement outcomes. Provider misconfiguration is not a successful outcome and is reported exclusively through [`AudioVmError`] with `kind = AudioErrorKind::ProviderMisconfigured`.

oneOf.description: Host-side PipeWire policy and guest-side guestd policy both applied.
Host-side enforcement only; guestd is absent or the provider does not support guest enforcement.
Guest-side guestd enforcement only; no local PipeWire node (e.g. ACA sandbox with a guestd-compatible agent).
Neither host nor guest enforcement is supported for this target.

AudioErrorKind.description:
Low-cardinality error kind for a per-VM audio failure.

Used in [`AudioVmError`] and [`VmAudioErrorOutputV1`](crate::VmAudioErrorOutputV1) so that both the wire protocol and the generated CLI schema carry enum constraints rather than a free-form string.

Serde names match the canonical wire strings exactly.

oneOf.description: The provider is expected to expose a guestd-compatible agent but none was found; operator remediation is required.
The requested VM was not found in the bundle.
Audio enforcement is not available for this VM (e.g. the runtime does not support it and no degraded path exists).

AudioProviderKind.description: Which runtime provider handles audio for a given target VM.

oneOf.description: Cloud Hypervisor NixOS VM with vhost-user-sound + PipeWire.
qemu-media VM with a declared qemu audio backend.
ACA sandbox with a guestd-compatible agent for audio policy.
